target: Issue #239 implementation — naiaKey credential flow redesign. 9 files changed: agent/src/protocol.ts (AuthUpdateRequest type), agent/src/providers/factory.ts (setAgentNaiaKey/getAgentNaiaKey module state, buildProvider routing), agent/src/index.ts (auth_update handler, TTS fallback), shell/src/lib/chat-service.ts (removed naiaKey from SendChatOptions+tts_request, added sendAuthUpdate), shell/src/components/ChatPanel.tsx (removed naiaKey from provider object and top-level), shell/src/components/OnboardingWizard.tsx (sendAuthUpdate on login), shell/src/components/SettingsTab.tsx (sendAuthUpdate on re-login), shell/src/App.tsx (sendAuthUpdate on init), shell/src/lib/discord-relay.ts (removed naiaKey).
